subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, my God! I am the one who hath turned towards the Kaaba of Thy knowledge and the sanctuary of Thy reunion and Thy presence, turning away from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی انا الذی اقبلت الی کعبه عرفانک و حرم وصلک و لقائک معرضا عن
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection
